purpose: Website route readiness registry for report-only assessment of public pages, legal pages, desktop beta pages, mobile/PWA pages, and protected/review-required website surfaces before runtime implementation.

readinessStatuses.empty: No meaningful route evidence or content/readiness baseline exists yet.
readinessStatuses.draft: Route exists or is planned but needs readiness evidence, content review, route/link checks, and visual/mobile checks.
readinessStatuses.usable: Route appears usable as a beta/public surface but still needs conversion, investor, or device evidence before higher status.
readinessStatuses.conversion_ready: Public conversion criteria, content clarity, route/link evidence, visual smoke, and protected-claim review are complete.
readinessStatuses.investor_ready: Investor-facing claims are substantiated, reviewed, and linked to approved sources; protected topics remain reviewed.
readinessStatuses.beta_ready: Beta route criteria, route/link evidence, visual/mobile evidence, and protected-topic reviews are complete.
readinessStatuses.blocked: Route cannot advance until a documented blocker is resolved.
readinessStatuses.review_required: Route or topic touches legal, privacy, health, child, token/economy, payment, reward, investor, public-claim, analytics, AI, camera/AR, or compliance-sensitive material.

routeGroups.public_pages: Public website and acquisition/help/waitlist surfaces. Conversion and SEO work is planning-only until approved.
routeGroups.legal_pages: Datenschutz, AGB, Impressum, and other legal/compliance pages. Always human-review-required for wording changes.
routeGroups.desktop_beta_pages: Authenticated or beta-preview desktop application routes. No client authority changes through this framework.
routeGroups.mobile_pwa_pages: Mobile/PWA routes requiring manual device, permission, viewport, PWA, and privacy evidence.
routeGroups.protected_or_review_required_pages: Routes involving competition, rewards, economy, marketplace, analytics, AR/camera, health, child, payment, token/NFT, investor, or public-claim topics.

websiteBacklogUsage: Detailed route findings, review_required website gaps, blocked items, and next safe tasks live in the report-only Website Agent Backlog; this readiness register remains the route/status summary.

readinessSummary.publicPages: Registered public pages are draft or usable; none are conversion_ready because conversion, SEO, visual smoke, and protected-claim review evidence is incomplete.
readinessSummary.legalPages: Legal pages remain review_required; no legal wording or runtime legal pages were changed.
readinessSummary.desktopBetaPages: Desktop beta pages are usable, draft, or review_required depending on protected topics; no beta_ready advancement is recorded.
readinessSummary.mobilePwaPages: Mobile/PWA pages remain draft or review_required because manual route-by-route phone evidence and browser visual smoke evidence are incomplete.
readinessSummary.protectedOrReviewRequiredPages: Reward, mission completion, PvP/betting, marketplace/token/NFT/payment, analytics/privacy, health, camera/AR, and AI Buddy routes remain review_required.

evidenceSummary.routeApiDriftDetector: PASS with 31 discovered app pages, 9 discovered API routes, 32 registered pages, and no missing route/API register entries.
evidenceSummary.visualRouteSmokeCheck: SKIPPED_BROWSER_UNAVAILABLE; no screenshots generated and no baseline/current comparison evidence exists in this environment.
evidenceSummary.productReadinessCheck: PASS; sensitive modules remain blocked or review_required where applicable and no critical module is production_ready.
evidenceSummary.websiteAgentFrameworkCheck: PASS; report-only framework remains active and forbids runtime changes, auto-merge, auto-repair, approval, and deployment.
evidenceSummary.websiteAgentBacklogCheck: PASS; backlog entries remain machine-readable and report-only.
evidenceSummary.qualityGate: Initial quality gate reported FAIL only because PR diff review report exits with code 1 before a PR exists; all website framework/backlog/readiness checks ran safely.

blockedOrReviewRequired: Legal/privacy/compliance wording requires human review before status advancement.
Mobile/PWA readiness needs device model, OS, browser, viewport, PWA, permission, and route-specific manual evidence.

Protected economy, token/NFT, payment, PvP/betting, reward authority, mission completion, health, child, analytics, camera/AR, and AI Buddy routes require review and must not be marked conversion_ready, investor_ready, or beta_ready.
baselineAudit.runtimeChangeConfirmation: No runtime website, app, mobile, legal, package, Firebase, GitHub workflow, public asset, Functions, Firestore rules, or Unity files were changed.
